_comment: Accumulated moon-track threads for eclipticam-v1 (OV5647, day-mode). Each thread = one night's marked moon points (a curve of known sky positions). Coords are full-res 2592x1944 pixels (moon-overlay auto-scales to the target image). Add a thread per clear night; non-parallel threads (different declinations) pin pointing/scale/distortion. Marked via splay p-probe (native full-res, see the p-probe RES= tag) -> mark-moon-net.
